lifecycle_layer_legend.L1: trigger validation (BLOCK cells; STOP on violation, before any computation)
lifecycle_layer_legend.L2: configuration assertion (IR/CIR/FU/B; WARN on violation, before computation)
lifecycle_layer_legend.L3: result interpretation (IR-04, IR-10, CDP-01..CDP-12; enforced at reporting time)

extraction_notes: Rule IDs preserved verbatim from Kimi (IR-XX, CIR-XX, FU-XX, B-XX, CDP-XX); NOT renamed to INV-XX/RULE-NN.
source_nodes references normalized to phase1_nodes.json convention (lowercase snake_case): 'LCA HC-22' -> 'lca_hc_22', 'S-LCA HC-06' -> 'slca_hc_06'.
IR-04 (Parallel Interpretation) and IR-10 (Anti-Aggregation) placed at L3 per v2 §2 ('fires at L3 reporting'). Other 18 IRs at L2.
All 12 CDPs at L3 (informative; enforced via referenced IRs).
v2 §4.2 CIR rules describe activations not assertions: schema uses 'actions' field instead of 'assertion'/'violation_message'.
v2 §4.3-4.4 FU/B rules don't list source_nodes explicitly; derived best-effort from assertion fields. Validation script flags mismatches.

Some v2 source_nodes references look semantically off relative to the cited node's content (e.g., IR-02 cites lca_hc_20 'methodological charter' under 'Consistent boundaries'; IR-05 cites lca_hc_13 'Pedigree Matrix' under 'Methodological Autonomy'). Preserved verbatim — validation script (commit 2) surfaces these as warnings rather than silently fixing.
CIR source_nodes derived from v2 §9.2 example for CIR-05 + analogous derivation for CIR-01..04, 06..10 from action descriptions. Not authoritative.
trigger_condition_raw preserves v2 §3-§4 wording; trigger_condition is the formal expression (Python-like with set membership IN, intersection ∩, count_true helper).
BLOCK triggers use formal expressions referencing case.* fields and lcc_type derived state. lcc_type is computed by lcc_trig_01 (phase1_nodes.json L0 trigger node) before L1 BLOCK evaluation.

blocks.trigger_condition_raw: Q1=D (corporate ESG, ILCD C2) AND lcc_type includes E-LCC
blocks.user_message: Corporate accounting (Q1=D) requires allocation-based LCC. Combination with E-LCC (system expansion) is forbidden by ILCD framework. Either change Q1 to A/B/C/E, or drop E-LCC from your LCC type.

blocks.trigger_condition_raw: Q3.SOC=true AND user explicitly selects 'Absolute' S-LCA mode (advanced override)
blocks.user_message: S-LCA in Industrial Symbiosis context must be Comparative (default). Absolute mode disables IS-specific methodology. Select Comparative S-LCA or remove SOC from Q3.

blocks.trigger_condition_raw: Q3 = no checkboxes selected (all three ENV/ECO/SOC false)
blocks.trigger_condition: case.q3.env == false AND case.q3.eco == false AND case.q3.soc == false
blocks.user_message: Select at least one sustainability dimension (Environmental, Economic, or Social) to proceed.

blocks.trigger_condition_raw: Q1=A (specific exchange) AND Q5=e (aggregated/black-box) for all flows
blocks.trigger_condition: case.q1 == 'A' AND all(flow.q5 == 'e' for flow in case.flows)
blocks.user_message: A specific exchange between two companies cannot be analyzed as black-box aggregated. Specify the nature of each flow (a/b/c/d) in Q5, or change Q1 to B/C.

integration_rules.name: Shared Functional Unit
integration_rules.violation_message: Functional Unit must be identical across active dimensions per IR-01.

integration_rules.name: Consistent System Boundaries
integration_rules.trigger_condition: case.q3.env == true AND case.q3.eco == true AND lcc_type IN ['E-LCC','C+E','C+E+S']
integration_rules.violation_message: LCA system boundary and E-LCC physical boundary must be identical per IR-02.

integration_rules.name: S-LCA Comparative
integration_rules.violation_message: S-LCA must be Comparative when active in IS context (no Absolute mode in user-mode) per IR-03.

integration_rules.name: Parallel Interpretation
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3 has ≥2 dims active (fires at L3 reporting)
integration_rules.violation_message: Parallel interpretation enforced: no single-score aggregation across dimensions per IR-04.

integration_rules.name: Methodological Autonomy
integration_rules.assertion: each dim retains own units in report.dimensions[*].units
integration_rules.violation_message: Each dimension must retain its own units per IR-05 (no cross-dimensional unit normalization).

integration_rules.name: Unified Data Governance
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3 has ≥2 dims active AND Q1∈{A,B,C,E}
integration_rules.trigger_condition: count_true([case.q3.env, case.q3.eco, case.q3.soc]) >= 2 AND case.q1 IN ['A','B','C','E']
integration_rules.violation_message: Multi-actor IS multi-dim assessments require facilitator + signed NDAs per IR-06.

integration_rules.name: Identical Reference Scenarios
integration_rules.violation_message: Reference scenario type (FU+boundary+temporal+geographic) must be identical across active dimensions per IR-07.

integration_rules.name: MFCA/MFA Common Backbone
integration_rules.violation_message: When LCA and LCC both active, MFA/MFCA must be the common physical backbone per IR-08.

integration_rules.name: Multifunctionality Alignment
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3.ENV+ECO AND any flow has Q5=c (substitution)
integration_rules.trigger_condition: case.q3.env == true AND case.q3.eco == true AND any(flow.q5 == 'c' for flow in case.flows)
integration_rules.violation_message: Quality correction factor must be identical across LCA and LCC for substitution flows per IR-09.

integration_rules.name: Anti-Aggregation
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q4 in {C, D, B} (any external use; fires at L3)
integration_rules.violation_message: Public-facing reports cannot use aggregated single scores per IR-10.

integration_rules.name: Layered Reporting Isomorphism
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q4 ∈ {C, D} AND Q3 has ≥2 dims
integration_rules.violation_message: Three-layer reporting structure must be isomorphic across active dimensions per IR-11.

integration_rules.name: Transport-Spatial Co-Modeling
integration_rules.assertion: lca.transport.foreground != null AND lcc.transport_costs != null AND slca.territorial_dimension != null
integration_rules.violation_message: When geographic spread is non-trivial, transport modeling must be coupled across all active dimensions per IR-12.

integration_rules.name: Capital Goods Alignment
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3.ENV+ECO AND IS-unique capital goods present
integration_rules.trigger_condition: case.q3.env == true AND case.q3.eco == true AND case.is_specific_capital_goods == true
integration_rules.violation_message: IS-unique capital goods must be amortized identically across LCA and LCC per IR-13.

integration_rules.name: Uncertainty Complementarity
integration_rules.assertion: lca.uncertainty.method IN ['Pedigree+MC'] AND lcc.uncertainty.method IN ['MC+Pedigree'] AND slca.uncertainty.method == 'qualitative'
integration_rules.violation_message: Each dimension must use its proper uncertainty paradigm; cross-dim normalization not allowed per IR-14.

integration_rules.name: Zero-Valuation Hierarchy
integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3.ENV+ECO AND any flow has Q5=a or Q5=b
integration_rules.trigger_condition: case.q3.env == true AND case.q3.eco == true AND any(flow.q5 IN ['a','b'] for flow in case.flows)
integration_rules.violation_message: LCA 4-step zero-burden hierarchy and LCC avoidable/unavoidable test must yield same classification per flow per IR-15.

integration_rules.name: Entity-First Calculation
integration_rules.violation_message: Calculation must proceed entity-first within each method per IR-16.

integration_rules.name: Screening Before Detail
integration_rules.violation_message: Screening study must precede detailed study per IR-17.

integration_rules.name: Critical Review for Public Assertions
integration_rules.assertion: review.panel.experts >= 3 AND review.panel.independent == true AND review.scope == 'all_dimensions'
integration_rules.violation_message: Public superiority claims (Q4=C) require panel of 3+ independent experts covering all active dimensions per IR-18.

integration_rules.name: Comparative Framing
integration_rules.violation_message: All IS reports must be framed as comparative outcomes (NOT absolute) per IR-19.

integration_rules.name: Three-Level Analytical Isomorphism
integration_rules.assertion: each method exposes 3 analytical levels (network+entity+flow for LCA/LCC; system+stakeholder+indicator for S-LCA)
integration_rules.violation_message: Each method must expose three analytical levels for cross-method comparison per IR-20.

conditional_integration_rules.name: GIS-Coupled Spatial Modeling
conditional_integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q7 ∈ {B, C, D} OR transport-sensitive exchanges

conditional_integration_rules.name: Percolation Counterparty Risk
conditional_integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q1=B AND network_nodes >= 3 AND interdependent_flows == true
conditional_integration_rules.trigger_condition: case.q1 == 'B' AND case.network_nodes >= 3 AND case.interdependent_flows == true

conditional_integration_rules.name: Shared CAPEX Stakeholder Indicators
conditional_integration_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q1 ∈ {B, C} AND IS-specific capital goods present

fu_rules.name: Function-Oriented FU Default
fu_rules.violation_message: LCA Functional Unit must be function-oriented (LCA MC-07 authoritative) per FU-01.

fu_rules.name: System of Functional Units (Multi-Actor)
fu_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q1 ∈ {B, C} AND multi-actor IS network
fu_rules.violation_message: Multi-actor IS networks require System of Functional Units (SFU) for aggregation per FU-02.

fu_rules.name: FE-FU Equality (LCA+LCC)
fu_rules.violation_message: When LCA+LCC active, FE must be documented in charter and identical to LCA FU per FU-03.

fu_rules.name: S-LCA Dual Unit Layer
fu_rules.violation_message: S-LCA must populate both shared FU and stakeholder-based unit per FU-04.

fu_rules.name: Reference Scenario Uniformity
fu_rules.assertion: all three methods use the same reference scenario type for FU benchmarks
fu_rules.violation_message: Reference scenario type must be uniform across active methods for FU benchmarks per FU-05.

boundary_rules.name: E-LCC Physical Boundary Equals LCA
boundary_rules.trigger_condition_raw: lcc_type ∈ {E-LCC, C+E, C+E+S} AND Q3.ENV active
boundary_rules.violation_message: E-LCC physical boundary must equal LCA system boundary per B-01.

boundary_rules.name: Cross-Method System Boundary Consistency
boundary_rules.assertion: lca.system_boundary consistent with lcc.economic_boundary and slca.boundary
boundary_rules.violation_message: System boundaries across active methods must be consistent per B-02.

boundary_rules.name: S-LCA Boundary Alignment
boundary_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3.SOC active AND (Q3.ENV OR Q3.ECO active) AND lcc_type ∈ {E-LCC, C+E, C+E+S}
boundary_rules.trigger_condition: case.q3.soc == true AND (case.q3.env == true OR case.q3.eco == true) AND lcc_type IN ['E-LCC','C+E','C+E+S']
boundary_rules.violation_message: S-LCA boundary must be aligned with LCA system boundary and LCC physical boundary when E-LCC active per B-03.

boundary_rules.name: S-LCA Territorial Dimension Mandatory
boundary_rules.violation_message: S-LCA territorial dimension is mandatory in addition to organizational per B-04.

boundary_rules.name: Geographic Spread Transport Coupling
boundary_rules.violation_message: Geographic spread requires explicit transport in both LCA foreground and LCC costs per B-05.

boundary_rules.name: Capital Goods Amortization Alignment
boundary_rules.trigger_condition_raw: Q3.ENV+ECO AND IS-unique capital goods present
boundary_rules.trigger_condition: case.q3.env == true AND case.q3.eco == true AND case.is_specific_capital_goods == true
boundary_rules.assertion: lca.capital_goods.included == true AND lcc.capital_goods.included == true AND lca.capital_goods.amortization_period == lcc.capital_goods.amortization_period
boundary_rules.violation_message: Capital goods must be included in both LCA and LCC AND amortization periods must match per B-06.

boundary_rules.name: Boundary Truncation Documentation
boundary_rules.assertion: all boundary truncations documented in report.blind_spots for all active dimensions
boundary_rules.violation_message: Boundary truncations must be transparently declared in blind_spots for each active dimension per B-07.

critical_decision_points.name: Displaced Products Divergence
critical_decision_points.tension: LCA/LCC system expansion may use different displaced products
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Identical reference scenario + identical Q factor enforced (IR-09)

critical_decision_points.name: Discounting Mismatch
critical_decision_points.tension: LCA forbids discounting; LCC mandates it
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Each retains own convention (IR-05); LCC uses annualized costs for eco-efficiency

critical_decision_points.name: Single-Score vs NPV
critical_decision_points.tension: S-LCA prohibits single-score; LCC produces NPV
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Parallel interpretation per IR-04; NPV reported as economic dim only

critical_decision_points.name: Uncertainty Paradigm Mismatch
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Quantitative for LCA/LCC, qualitative for S-LCA reported side-by-side

critical_decision_points.name: Zero-Burden vs Avoidable Test
critical_decision_points.tension: LCA zero-burden hierarchy vs LCC avoidable test divergence
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Consolidated 4-step decision tree per IR-15; resolved by neutral facilitator

critical_decision_points.name: FU Definition Tri-Method Divergence
critical_decision_points.tension: LCA function-oriented vs LCC flow-oriented vs S-LCA stakeholder-based FU
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: FU-01 to FU-05 applied; LCA function-oriented authoritative

critical_decision_points.name: Reporting Architecture Divergence
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Unified 3-layer reporting per IR-11 + multi-level disaggregation per IR-20

critical_decision_points.name: Weighting/Aggregation Tension
critical_decision_points.tension: LCA bans weighting (public); S-LCA bans single-score; users want single scores
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: No single-score for public disclosure per IR-10; internal dashboards remain 3 separate

critical_decision_points.name: Futurization Asymmetry
critical_decision_points.tension: LCA/LCC futurization paradigms differ; S-LCA has no futurization
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: LCA and LCC use identical SSP/RCP per CIR-01; S-LCA uses current-period

critical_decision_points.name: Governance Structure Divergence
critical_decision_points.tension: Three different governance structures (panel, facilitator, engagement)
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: Facilitator coordinates; panel reviews independently; engagement parallel

critical_decision_points.name: MFCA/MFA Cross-Method Alignment
critical_decision_points.tension: MFCA/MFA may not match LCA process tree or S-LCA stakeholder groups
critical_decision_points.resolution_at_l3: MFCA/MFA for LCA-LCC only; S-LCA uses parallel interpretation
